*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION 4*: THE ALGORITHM SHOULD BE OPTIMIZED TO AVOID REPEATED ELEMENTS AND SHOULD NOT USE AUXILIARY DATA STRUCTURES LIKE DICTIONARIES OR SETS.
